verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God before us god beside God within us abide God in heaven and in this place Father we commit to you this day

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God in pleasure god in paint God in ever remain God in gladness and God in strive Father we commit to you our lives

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For we know, that you are faithful Through the stillness and the storm For you've been with us from the start Father we commit to you our hearts
